# statplot

- [statplot](#statplot)
  - [Installation](#installation)

`statplot` is an R package designed to simplify the creation of figures
used in common statistical analyses. It provides convenient wrapper
functions for generating clean, publication-ready visualizations with
minimal code.

## Installation

You can install the development version of statplot from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
pak::pak("jarbet/statplot")

# Alternatively try:
# BiocManager::install("jarbet/statplot")

# Or if using renv:
# renv::install("jarbet/statplot")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`combine_pvalues()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/combine_pvalues.md)
  : Combine p-values
- [`comma()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/comma.md) :
  Format numbers with comma as thousands separator
- [`ex_data_heatmap`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/ex_data_heatmap.md)
  : Example tidy expression dataset for heatmap plotting
- [`ex_expr_pathway`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/ex_expr_pathway.md)
  : Example expression matrix for pathway correlation network plots
- [`ex_log2fc_pathway`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/ex_log2fc_pathway.md)
  : Example log2 fold-change vector for pathway correlation network
  plots
- [`format_pvalue()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/format_pvalue.md)
  : Format p-values for display
- [`hallmark_pathway_categories`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/hallmark_pathway_categories.md)
  : Hallmark pathway process categories
- [`hallmark_t2g`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/hallmark_t2g.md)
  : Hallmark gene sets (Human) from MSigDB
- [`plot_2_categorical_vars()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_2_categorical_vars.md)
  : Stacked percent bar chart for two categorical variables
- [`plot_barplot_by_group()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_barplot_by_group.md)
  : Bar plot comparing a numeric outcome between two conditions
- [`plot_bars()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_bars.md)
  : Bar plot by group
- [`plot_confidence_intervals()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_confidence_intervals.md)
  : Dot-and-whisker plot of estimates with confidence intervals
- [`plot_covariate_heatmap()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_covariate_heatmap.md)
  : Plot a covariate heatmap
- [`plot_data_avail_by_group()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_data_avail_by_group.md)
  : Plot data availability by group
- [`plot_dotmap()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_dotmap.md)
  : Create a dotmap showing effect size (dot size & color) and p-value
  (tile fill)
- [`plot_effectsize_01_intervals()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_effectsize_01_intervals.md)
  : Plot effect-size estimates and confidence intervals. All values must
  be between 0 and 1.
- [`plot_heatmap()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_heatmap.md)
  : Plot a heatmap from tidy data
- [`plot_numeric_by_2groups()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_numeric_by_2groups.md)
  : Violin + boxplot with Wilcoxon rank-sum test
- [`plot_numeric_by_3plusgroups()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_numeric_by_3plusgroups.md)
  : Violin + boxplot of a numeric variable by a grouping factor
- [`plot_pathway_correlation_network()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_pathway_correlation_network.md)
  : Gene–Gene correlation network for a single pathway
- [`plot_pathways()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_pathways.md)
  : Gene–Pathway network plot (cnetplot)
- [`plot_pvalue_barplot()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_pvalue_barplot.md)
  : Plot p-value barplot
- [`plot_survival_curves()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_survival_curves.md)
  : Kaplan–Meier plot from a Surv object
- [`plot_upset()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/plot_upset.md)
  : Build an upset plot from a named list of sets
- [`quarto_html_tabset_list()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/quarto_html_tabset_list.md)
  : Render a named list as a Quarto tabset
- [`quarto_note()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/quarto_note.md)
  : Render a collaborator comment for Quarto output
- [`run_gsea()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/run_gsea.md)
  : Run Gene Set Enrichment Analysis (GSEA)
- [`table_basic()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/table_basic.md)
  : Create a basic table using tinytable
- [`table_overall()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/table_overall.md)
  : Create a table that summarizes the entire cohort.
- [`table_overall_and_group()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/table_overall_and_group.md)
  : Create overall and by-group summary table
- [`theme_bw2()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/theme_bw2.md)
  : Bold-styled Black and White Theme
- [`theme_classic2()`](https://github.com/jarbet/statplot/reference/theme_classic2.md)
  : Bold-styled Classic Theme
